case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASUER & VS. KAREN LOPEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASUER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, KAREN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-11-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-11-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER REPRESENTED BY JOANNE ADDAMS CLAIMS OFFICER. DEFENDANT KAREN LOPEZ DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $45.50 SERVED DEC-20-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, KAREN
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASUER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, KAREN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-11-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASUER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, KAREN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,045.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASUER & TAX COLLECTOR
